meta.poznamky: start_blocks_xml má prohozené right↔left v přesunu (left(90) forward(20) right(90) místo right(90) forward(20) left(90)).

cms.task_text: Sloupy se kreslí špatným směrem. Opravte kód tak, aby odpovídal vzoru.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
